def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    atr_window = params['atr_window']
    breakout_multiplier = params['breakout_multiplier']
    df['atr'] = ta.volatility.AverageTrueRange(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=atr_window).average_true_range()
    df['upper_band'] = df['close'].shift(1) + breakout_multiplier * df['atr'].shift(1)
    df['lower_band'] = df['close'].shift(1) - breakout_multiplier * df['atr'].shift(1)
    signals = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    signals[df['close'] > df['upper_band']] = 1
    signals[df['close'] < df['lower_band']] = -1
    return signals.astype(int)
rationale: Silver exhibits breakout behavior when price moves beyond dynamically adjusted ATR-based bands, indicating potential trend continuation.
